message:
perf(core): decode retained SUM columns without value materialization

Add a projected record-header helper that keeps full malformed-record validation while retaining offsets only for the requested columns. Use it in the retained autocommit COUNT(*)+SUM() overlay path to classify NULL/integer/float directly and fall back to the ordinary aggregate path for text/blob coercion semantics.\n\nMixed OLTP release-perf comparison on 2026-04-25: baseline F median 475.15 ms; patched runs 423.01 / 411.24 / 419.11 ms, with perf capture at 419.12 ms.
